\begin{table*}[t]
\centering
\small
\begin{tabular}{p{0.18\linewidth}p{0.28\linewidth}p{0.44\linewidth}}
\toprule
Comparator & Evidence standard & ObviousBench positioning \\
\midrule
SimpleQA~\citep{wei2024simpleqa} & Unambiguous answer criteria, calibration, and grading transparency. & Borrow answer-criteria discipline while targeting visible micro-failures rather than factuality. \\
IFEval~\citep{zhou2023ifeval} & Constraint-level automated evaluation and concise benchmark-paper structure. & Borrow objective constraint verification while separating answer correctness from format compliance. \\
FollowBench~\citep{jiang2024followbench} & Taxonomy-driven reporting by constraint type and difficulty level. & Borrow taxonomy reporting while keeping items short, public-facing, and deterministically scored. \\
LiveBench~\citep{white2025livebench} & Fresh data, objective scoring, update policy, limitations, and reproducibility reporting. & Borrow contamination and update discipline without claiming the current paper split is live. \\
LiveCodeBench~\citep{jain2024livecodebench} & Source-vintage reporting, setup details, and contamination analysis. & Borrow source-vintage and audit framing, while excluding coding-specific claims. \\
GSM-Symbolic~\citep{mirzadeh2025gsmsymbolic} & Template families, controlled variants, and robustness analysis beyond a single headline score. & Borrow variant and metamorphic framing for short obvious prompts. \\
MMLU-Pro~\citep{wang2024mmlupro} & Benchmark construction pipeline, setup detail, results, error analysis, and limitations. & Position ObviousBench as complementary rather than harder or broader. \\
GPQA~\citep{rein2023gpqa} & Question objectivity, data collection, baselines, and limitations. & Use as an opposite-difficulty comparator: human-trivial reliability is not expert reasoning. \\
Humanity's Last Exam~\citep{phan2026hle} & Dataset review, evaluation setup, quantitative reporting, and discussion. & Use as a high-visibility opposite-difficulty comparator. \\
When Benchmarks Age~\citep{jiang2025benchmarkaging} & Explicit vintage, refresh, and temporal-misalignment discussion. & Use to justify reporting split vintage and avoiding overclaims about public seed freshness. \\
SimpleBench~\citep{simplebench} & Human-easy framing and public-facing simplicity. & Differentiate on deterministic scorer contracts, source cards, split hygiene, and regression use. \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\caption{Related-work positioning matrix for nearby benchmark reports.}
\label{tab:related-work-positioning}
\end{table*}
